title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at K Raheja Corp

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at K Raheja Corp
jsonLd.description:
K Raheja Corp has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About K Raheja Corp:
K Raheja Corp is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
